'''''Imperieuse''''' was a [[Broadside-class cruiser kdb-1|''Broadside''-class cruiser]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
''Impérieux'' is [[Wikipedia:French language|French]] for "[[Wiktionary:imperious|imperious]]," and ''Impérieuse'' its feminine counterpart. Three ships of the British Royal Navy have been named [[Wikipedia:HMS Imperieuse|HMS ''Imperieuse'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
